allowed_claims: STWM predicts future semantic trace fields under free rollout.
Copy-gated residual semantic transition improves changed semantic states while preserving stable states.
Belief association utility supports future identity association.
must_disclose: VIPSeg changed-subset gain is positive but smaller than VSPW.
Dedicated LODO cross-dataset training/eval is not yet completed.
Horizon evidence is H=8 unless H16 appendix is run.
Current field is best described as semantic trace-unit field unless K-scaling appendix is executed.
C32 is selected from val-only fullscale mixed selection; prototype vocabulary granularity should be stated explicitly.
LODO, model-size scaling, horizon scaling, and density scaling are not completed in live repo.
Same-output free-rollout baseline suite is incomplete.
Final video assets are not yet rendered.
